# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert

Prevent command injection.
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def process_image
    image_path = params[:image].path
    output_path = "#{Rails.root}/public/#{params[:format]}.jpg"
    format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]

    if format && size
      command = "convert #{image_path} -resize #{size} #{output_path}"
      system(command)
      render json: { status: 'success', message: 'Image processed successfully' }
    else
      render json: { status: 'error', message: 'Invalid parameters' }
    end
  rescue StandardError => e
    render json: { status: 'error', message: e.message }
  end
end
